goal: Implement the Claude Design MeowShop.dc.html visual into the real Shop + Your Decks
done: Imported the design via the DesignSync MCP (claude.ai/design project 7fc9f706, file MeowShop.dc.html) and restyled the live shop to match it. Shop (js/shop.js buildHero/buildDeckCell + .shop-* CSS in styles.css): gold eyebrow with a dash rule + Cormorant-italic 'Meow Coin Shop' title, gold balance pill top-right, 2-col deck grid where each cell is a gold-framed cover-cropped deck back (radius 15px, shadow) with an owned check badge overlay, a Cormorant deck name + the other-language sub-name, and a full-width gold->rose (#d49a2c->#d12878) price button (gray when unaffordable) or a white Owned pill; cells deal-in with a staggered animation (prefers-reduced-motion respected); tapping art/name opens the existing Fool-preview popup. Used the app's --mt-font-display/--mt-font-body vars so it matches the live font stack. Your Decks (js/decks.js): added the design's 'Want more decks?' -> Shop nudge card (plum->magenta gradient, coin icon, Cormorant title + body + gold 'Go to Shop' pill, links to /shop.html, EN/TH). The deck-preview + coin-earned popups already matched the design (shipped earlier). Cache-bust 20260622e -> 20260622f; www synced. Headless-verified shop grid + Your Decks nudge.
fix: translate the MeowShop.dc.html design tokens into the real shop markup + CSS (shop list, deck cells, balance pill, Your-Decks shop nudge).
verified: headless shop.html: gold eyebrow + italic title + balance pill + gold-framed deck grid + gold->rose 100 buttons
headless decks.html: owned-only grid + active badge + stacked 'Want more decks?' shop nudge
